title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CDAC Consulting Pvt Ltd!
